programme.title: Atashinchi
programme.desc: Mikan, Yuzuhiko and their parents navigate their daily lives while confronting various challenges. However, the Tachibana family is known for their clumsiness.

programme.title: Selfie With Bajrangi
programme.desc: Ankush's life changes when he meets a mysterious nine-year-old child named Bajrangi, who is visible to nobody but him alone.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Pokemon
programme.desc: A Pokémon master embarks on an adventurous journey across the world, along with his group of friends, to catch maximum pocket monsters.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shinchan Aur Harry Ki Anokhi Jodi
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy who lives with his parents and his sister embarks on mischievous adventures that often lead to hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Perman
programme.desc: Mitsuo Suwa, a clumsy boy, works as an apprentice for Birdman to become a powerful superhero, Perman, and rescues the victims of crime and disasters.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Taffy
programme.desc: Mrs Muchmore ends up adopting a raccoon named Taffy after mistaking it for a cat. But while Taffy enjoys his life with Mrs Muchmore, her Doberman, Bentley, is determined to expose Taffy as a fraud.

programme.title: Doraemon
programme.desc: Doraemon, a robot cat from the future, travels back in time to take care of a young boy named Nobita Nobi with the help of his futuristic gadgets.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey and Bunny, two cats who are twin brothers, go on exciting adventures while protecting each other from enemies at every turn.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Bunny mistakenly gets an egg instead of a ball while playing football. Later, everyone is taken aback when the egg starts cracking.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey Bunny and companions pursue a naughty mouse, leading to unexpected complications. Consequently, they find themselves entangled in a predicament within a rat's underground dwelling.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: The professor is traumatised by Bunny's quirky answers in class. Later, Honey, Bunny and the gang feast on a scrumptious dinner at a wedding reception.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: Honey is furious after the bank refuses to allow him to withdraw his money. Later, Honey and Bunny are surprised to find a bouquet at their doorstep.

programme.title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
programme.desc: A fun visit to a nearby museum spells disaster for Honey and his gang of animal friends after an ancient mummy returns to haunt the gang.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst Hiroshi is working, Misae tries to stop Shin-chan from mischievously annoying him. Later, after his work is finished, Hiroshi spends time with Shin-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his mother visit the station and await the arrival of the train. Later, Shin-chan forces Misae to take him to a washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan brushes his teeth with new toothpaste and eats unhealthy snacks right after. As a result, Misae is left infuriated and she berates him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae is followed by Shin-chan when she is on her way to the bank. Once there, Shin-chan annoys her and keeps her from withdrawing any cash.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Keiko opts to help Shin-chan take some photographs when he gets the chance to pose for a magazine advertisement. However, Shin-chan accidentally breaks her camera.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan barges into the room of a college student to take shelter, she tries to evict him but incurs challenges along the way.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan, a mischievous five-year-old, constantly disrupts the lives of those around him with his childish antics, generating humorous chaos and exasperation.

programme.title: Shin chan & the alien invasion
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his family meet a mysterious alien from outer space. When the visitor turns his parents into children, Shin-chan must find a way to return them to normal.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Shin chan in the dreaming world
programme.desc: Shin-chan's dreams start to become nightmares in which his family and friends get stuck. Now it is up to him and the Kasukabe Defense Group to escape the nightmare and save the dream.

programme.title: Shin chan and The Buri Buri 3 Minutes Charge
programme.desc: Shin-chan's dreams become reality when his family is recruited by a time traveller to fight monsters. With just three minutes to complete their mission, they race against time to battle the entities.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A five-year-old boy, has many misadventures due to his peculiar antics, while his parents and tutors try to discipline him.

programme.title: One Punch Man
programme.desc: Saitama, a superhero who possesses the ability to vanquish his opponents with a mere punch, finds himself battling feelings of boredom and despondency.

programme.title: One Punch Man
programme.desc: Saitama, a superhero who possesses the ability to vanquish his opponents with a mere punch, finds himself battling feelings of boredom and despondency.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Meher tries to escape from Daittya Rani's lair and reach Baalveer. Meanwhile, Baalveer and the fairies think of ways to solve Meher'sproblem.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Meher tries to escape from the clutches of Daittya Rani and finds herself in strange lands. Will Baalveer be able to save her?

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Ballu is taken to a fairyland where he is blessed with special powers by six fairies, each having her own unique traits. He uses his powers to help good and honest children, including his friends.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Daittya Rani drinks the magical water and rejuvenates her youth. How will Baalveer deal with this stronger version of her?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: An old man robs Jethalal of his lucky bangle while he has tea with Popatlal. Shocked, Jethalal goes to the store to tell Bagha and Nattu Kaka about this.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Manhar Manmoji walks to Jethalal's shop and claims that it is his. He even sells a product to a customer, much to Nattu Kaka and Bagha's confusion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal complains to Inspector Pandey about Manhar invading his shop; Rajkumar Singhania visits Jethalal's store but gets forced to leave by Manhar Manmoji.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The whole colony celebrates as Popatlal wins a prestigious government award. Simultaneously, Taarak's boss learns of paranormal activity at his bungalow from a guest.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak requests leave from his boss, who defers a decision. But, the boss is hesitant to approve the leave due to unusual occurrences in his haunted house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak receives an invitation to his boss's home, but not merely for a simple visit. So, his boss asks his help in investigating the strange occurrences happening at his house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony is thrilled about a three-day picnic at Taarak's boss' bungalow. But will it be all fun and games, or will something spooky turn the trip upside down?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena looks forward to the picnic as the rest of Gokuldham packs their bags. Will this getaway bring new memories for everyone?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members pack their bags and embark on their bungalow picnic with fervor. But, they are unaware of the twists that await them on their road trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members finally reach the bungalow, looking forward to three days of relaxation. However, their getaway might turn spooky, just as Taarak's boss suspected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The colony members relax and have a picnic at the bungalow. But, something spooky may happen that could ruin their peaceful time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While everyone is busy having fun at the bungalow, Popatlal strays into the jungle and runs into a mysterious woman named Chakori. Who is she and why is she there?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As the colony members enjoy their time at the bungalow, Chakori waits patiently for night to fall. Will she end up spooking everyone once darkness sets in?

programme.title: Crime Patrol
programme.desc: The host presents dramatised re-enactments of real-life crime cases that revolve around harassment, kidnapping and murder.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The CID team reunites and discusses the mysterious events occurring on the island. Later, they engage in an epic confrontation with the mercenaries to save Dr Salunkhe.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Bhide receives a message from Bagha, he suspects that Jethalal has ordered him to send an insulting message to him. As an outcome of Bhide's assumption, it causes a rift between him and Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal calls Bagha to find out why he sent Bhide an insulting message. Later, Bagha clears up the confusion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha believe that their magical rings are changing their luck. Later, they decide to make Jethalal wear a ring too.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha and Nattu Kaka desperately try to prove the authenticity of the magical ring to Jethalal. In the meantime, Popatlal asks Bagha to order one ring for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Shortly after meeting a girl who could be his ideal bride, Popatlal loses his magical ring. Soon, Popatlal is devastated when the girl rejects him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal cannot believe his luck as Popatlal loses his ring. In the aftermath of the loss, Popatlal's fortunes take a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally caves in and decides to wear the ring. Soon, he begins to experience a radical change in fortunes.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Shani Dev's unfulfilled wish is granted when Lord Vishnu appears before him.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: Bollywood superstar, Govinda graces the show as a special guest, as the contestants reach the finale to win the title of Super Dancer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's friends decide to meet Surma Bhai and to convince him to let go of the shop. They accompany Jethalal to meet Surma Bhai at Madh Island.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: At Madh Island, Jethalal and his neighbours lose their way and spot a woman wearing a white saree and holding a diya. At Surma Bhai's bungalow, a man recounts his harrowing tale.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Surma Bhai shows Jethalal a video in which Nattu Kaka tells that Jethalal has agreed to sell the shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the adults of Gokuldham furiously demand an explanation from Iyer, who appears unfazed. However, he reveals something that shocks Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita stays with Jethalal after Iyer tells her he wants a divorce. Champaklal kicks Iyer out of the community. Babita decides to go through with the divorce.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita decides to call a lawyer. Bhide, Sodhi and Popatlal bring food for Iyer to console him in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide, Sodhi, and Popatlal ponder Iyer's decision to divorce. Bhide thinks about the C wing of Gokuldham, where everyone is unmarried. Babita has a restless night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: With the divorce procedure in motion, Iyer and Babita decide to leave Gokuldham despite everyone's protests. They share one last car ride before separating.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The people of Gokuldham realise that Iyer misunderstood Babita and race to get in contact with them. Iyer and Babita all of a sudden return to Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The misunderstanding between Iyer and Babita is cleared up. However, Maushami, Babita's friend, comes to Gokuldham to thank her for something unknown to everyone else.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men discuss friendships on social media. The ladies of Gokuldham are elated due to the cosy climate caused by the rain.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal walks in to see the women dancing in the rain. A surprise awaits Jethalal as he reaches the shop and gets out of the raincoat that Daya made him wear in the morning.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal ensures that Iyer and Babita don't see him returning home splattered in mud. Iyer wants to shoot a video of Jethalal in dirty clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Taarak comes home late from work, Anjali gets worried. Later, she finds Taarak's behaviour quite strange.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner and she starts to worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. She's shocked when Anjali reveals the reason for her worry.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Anjali overhears a conversation between Daya and Jethalal, it upsets her deeply and she decides to leave her house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali hides in Jethalal and Daya's home. Jethalal follows Taarak and is shocked to see him with a woman.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After coming back home, Jethalal reveals the truth about Taarak and the woman to a shocked Anjali and Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Taarak is confronted, he decides to reveal the truth about Kavita. The society members go to the police station.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goli's uncle and aunt come to visit Gokuldham Society with their smug son Monty. However, as soon as Monty meets Tapu, he challenges the leader of Tapu Sena and angers him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Tapu and his friends commence their night cricket, Goli's rude cousin joins them and wreaks havoc in the match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena's plans for a night cricket match enrages Bhide. When he quarrels with Jethalal about it, Taarak proposes a cricket match between the two.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society excitedly prepare to participate in their very first cricket match. Rival captains Bhide and Jethalal choose their team members.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and Jethalal's teams receive flashy names and sponsors for Gokuldham Premier League and the preparations for the big cricket match begin.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Gokuldham Premier League approaches, the showdowns between Bhide and Jethalal's teams begin. They hold a meeting to discuss the rules of the grand match.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sundar pays a surprise visit to Gokuldham Society and brings a special gift for Jethalal. However, Sundar's grand announcement becomes Jethalal's biggest issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After learning there will be a cricket match in Gokuldham Society, Sundar surprises everyone. He gets Jethalal a strange gift.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham Premier League takes an interesting turn when Jethalal has to bowl against Daya and Tapu. As the first inning concludes, Jethalal and his team prepare to bat.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and losing eight years of memory, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings amidst their father's alcoholism.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma makes a promise to a lady that she will help her reclaim her job. Later, Karishma is shocked to see that Fatima has been hired for the post.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: On being invited to her new boss's house, Fatima agrees to visit him. Fatima then learns that she will have to visit Karishma's police station to verify her identity card.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma makes a promise to a lady that she will help her reclaim her job. Later, Karishma is shocked to see that Fatima has been hired for the post.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: On being invited to her new boss's house, Fatima agrees to visit him. Fatima then learns that she will have to visit Karishma's police station to verify her identity card.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal visits Dr Hathi and asks him to administer an injection to Jethalal. However, he accidentally ends up injecting Bhide with the medicine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide walks around in pain and tells his friends about Dr Hathi's accidental injection; Popatlal receives an unexpected call from Kaveri.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: After doing various odd jobs, an uneducated woman from Gujarat starts a business to earn a living and attempts to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is confident that the panipuri scheme will be successful; Jethalal informs Bapuji that Nattu Kaka and Bagga had planned a surprise for him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gada Electronics makes amazing profits due to the free unlimited pani puri scheme. However, when the vendor has to go away because of some emergency, Jethalal finds himself in trouble.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Jethalal has no option, he disguises himself as the pani puri vendor and starts selling it himself. He later feels embarrassed when people start recognising him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Jethalal is making and selling the pani puris himself, Iyer and Babita pass by and see him. He gets embarrassed and tries to hide.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: Following a traumatic accident and an eight-year memory loss, Dr Dev struggles to rebuild his life as his former wife, Srishti, balances motherhood with running their medical facility.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita shoulders the responsibility of caring for her five younger siblings. As she navigates her family duties, she also strives to balance her emotional turmoil.
